title: conyza vulgaris
intro: Conyza vulgaris, also known as buttonweed or horseweed, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce inflammation and protect against cell damage. The health benefits of Conyza vulgaris include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as alleviating symptoms of fever and digestive problems. Conyza vulgaris can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
